ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "model_name" TEXT /* Name of the model */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the model */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_data_source" TEXT /* Source of the training data */,
  "training_date" TEXT /* Date when the model was trained */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of the model (e.g., CNN, GAN) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric entry */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model evaluated */,
  "input_res" TEXT /* Input resolution used during the evaluation */,
  "input_chans" INTEGER /* Number of input channels */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the model in seconds */,
  "fps" REAL /* Frames per second achieved by the model */,
  "iou" REAL /* Intersection over union metric for evaluation */,
  "size" INTEGER /* Size of the model in KB */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used during the evaluation */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware used for the evaluation */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used for the evaluation */,
  "evaluation_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance metrics were evaluated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_resolutions" (
  "resolution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each input resolution */,
  "input_res" TEXT /* Input resolution string (e.g., 512x512) */,
  "width" INTEGER /* Width of the input resolution */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the input resolution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("resolution_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "input_channels" (
  "channel_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each channel configuration */,
  "input_chans" INTEGER /* Number of input channels */,
  "channel_type" TEXT /* Type of input channels (e.g., RGB, grayscale) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("channel_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evaluation_sessions" (
  "session_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evaluation session */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the model being evaluated */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the evaluation session */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* User who conducted the evaluation */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes regarding the evaluation session */,
  "session_name" TEXT /* Descriptive name for the session */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware used during the session */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used during the session */,
  "session_duration" REAL /* Duration of the evaluation session in hours */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("session_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_sessions_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evaluation_sessions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "model_comparisons" (
  "comparison_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comparison entry */,
  "model_a_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the first model in the comparison */,
  "model_b_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the second model in the comparison */,
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the performance metric used for comparison */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the comparison (e.g., 'Model A better', 'Tie') */,
  "comparison_date" TEXT /* Date when the comparison was made */,
  "hardware_used" TEXT /* Hardware used for the comparison */,
  "dataset_used" TEXT /* Dataset used for the comparison */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comparison_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_b_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_b_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_model_a_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_a_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_model_comparisons_metric_id FOREIGN KEY ("metric_id") REFERENCES performance_metrics ("metric_id")
)
